language.label: Language
language.description: Used for UI text. Affects display only; does not change exchange or chart data.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.noTier: No achievements in this tier. Try "All".

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime-safe OpenPine settings exposed without secrets.
settings.saved: Settings saved. New defaults will be used by symbol search, strategy creation, and data health views.
settings.sectionTimeDesc: Used by date rendering, strategy form defaults, and future scheduler views.
settings.sectionMarketDesc: Controls which timeframes and pairs the UI surfaces first. This does not hide explicitly stored data.
settings.sectionLanguageDesc: Used for UI text. Affects display only; does not change exchange or chart data.
settings.timezoneHint: Popular UTC offsets only: {shown} shown / {unique} unique current offsets / {iana} IANA zones.
settings.defaultTimeframeHint: Used as the default in new strategy forms.
settings.stableOnly: Show only stablecoin pairs by default
settings.stableOnlyHint: Enable to choose which stable quote assets the UI prioritizes.
settings.symbolLimitHint: Backend max result count per `/api/data/symbols` query.
settings.include3m: Includes 3m. Backend validates the list before saving.
